li.xpath: Defs/GeneDef[defName="VQEA_Herculean" or defName="VQEA_Prowess" or defName="VQEA_BlurRunner" or defName="VQEA_Woundless" or defName="VQEA_Marksman" or defName="VQEA_PerfectVision" or defName="VQEA_PlasteelSkin" or defName="VQEA_PlasteelClaws" or defName="VQEA_Genius" or defName="VQEA_Levitation" or defName="VQEA_Serene" or defName="VQEA_PassiveMeditation" or defName="VQEA_Bulwark" or defName="VQEA_Enormous" or defName="VQEA_SubstanceImpervious" or defName="VQEA_InfernoSpew" or defName="VQEA_HellsphereBlast" or defName="VQEA_Invisibility" or defName="VQEA_SelfRepairingTissue" or defName="VQEA_Electromagnetized" or defName="VQEA_MatterPhasing"]/displayCategory
Defs/GeneDef[defName="VRE_Ecstasy" or defName="VRE_FilterInfection" or defName="VRE_Hemosmosis" or defName="VRE_ToxicCloud" or defName="VRE_HeartCrush" or defName="VRE_ViscuousGoo"]/displayCategory
Defs/GeneDef[defName="VRE_RapidAging" or defName="VRE_FastAging" or defName="VRE_SlowAging" or defName="VRE_EverGrowing"]/displayCategory
